---
title: "Mary Hendrickson"
image: media/EEG_Picture.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
---

Hello! My name is Mary and I'm a senior majoring in psychology and concentrating in statistics & data science and race & ethnic studies at St. Olaf College. This quarto website is for my Data Science 2 project!


## Fun Pictures!

::: {.columns style="gap: 3rem;"}

::: {.column}
![Michelangelo's David](media/David.jpeg){width=100%}

*I saw the David when I went to Italy during a J-term abroad! He is very large, about 17 ft tall!*
:::

::: {.column}
![My cat Bernie](media/Bernie.jpeg){width=100%}

*My cat Bernie! He's 5 years old and also quite large.*
:::

:::
